name: Geckoboard

name: Intercom
description: Developer of a conversational relationship platform designed to create personal connections with customers. name: Kibin

name: Lucid Software
description: Developer of collaborative diagramming and brand management software designed to improve clarity, communication, and productivity. name: OpenPhone
description: Provider of an application software intended to be used for sending and receiving text messages and phone calls.

name: MixRank

The company's platform collects and analyzes vast amounts of data across the internet to learn everything about possible buyers, company firmographics, decision-makers, websites, applications, commercial technologies, and advertising campaigns, enabling companies to narrow down and qualify their target prospects, plan market strategies and retain customers.

name: Peatix
description: Developer of a global event discovery platform designed to connect individuals with experiences across diverse categories, fostering shared passions and building vibrant communities. The company's platform offers a seamless search and ticketing experience for thousands of events, from art exhibitions and live music to workshops and conferences, enabling businesses to discover new interests, connect with like-minded individuals, and participate in unforgettable experiences.

name: Pic Collage
description: Developer of a mobile photo application designed to let users combine images, text, and stickers as freeform collages and share them amongst themselves. The company's application lets users search the internet from within the application to find photos, videos, and other images for photo collages in fun and novel ways, enabling users to combine photos, videos, captions, stickers, and special effects to create unique collages and images that they can share with friends.

name: Shoppable

name: Talkdesk

The company's platform facilitates personal engagement at scale, resulting in more leads, referrals and increased business, enabling estate professionals and brokers to maximize agent adoption, review key performance metrics and communicate effectively with their agents.

name: Tinfoil Security

The company's web application scanner checks website vulnerabilities using automated scan checks and tracks external hackers picking through each access point on the website, enabling developers to identify how to fix vulnerable areas before they get hacked.

The company's educational platform provides peer-to-peer learning communities, pedagogical models and tuition models and also operates a network of online schools that provides higher education programs, enabling people to get a proper degree, who might not otherwise get a college degree, due to cost or other commitments.

name: Artivest
description: Developer of an online investment platform designed to offer an investment opportunity in private equity and hedge funds. name: Beeem

description: Provider of a platform that connects creators of infographic content with audiences and publishers. The company's platform connects designers, journalists, animators and developers with clients, featuring cloud-based collaboration tools to enable content delivery.

name: Wiji
description: Provider of advertising technology for digital signs to deliver tailored messages to customers in real-time. The company's technology is a combination of anonymous facial detection, machine learning based optimization as well as strategies specified by the marketer.

name: Cadee
description: Operator of a social community for golfers. The company has developed an online platform through which golfers can discover new courses, share and compare golf scores, track golf activities of other members and calculate golf statistics.

name: eSpark
description: Provider of an iPad and web-based educational platform designed to transform academic goals with differentiated instruction. The company's web-based educational platform curate learning resources to create a personalized learning experience for each student, enabling teachers to meet the needs of every learner and transform classrooms with technology.

name: CakeHealth
description: Provider of online healthcare expense-management services. The company provides an online portal where users can manage their healthcare plans, claims and bills. It also enables users to see their out-of-pocket spending, the state of deductibles and unused benefits.

name: Fanbridge
description: Developer of a fan relationship management platform designed to manage fan acquisition, retention and engagement. The company's fan relationship management platform merges e-mails, social networking platforms and other digital media channels with direct-to-fan engagement tools, enabling artists, brands and other influencers to grow, engage and monetize their consumer fan bases.

name: LocBox Labs
description: Provider of online marketing services designed to help local businesses generate revenue. The company's online marketing services help to increase income from their past customers through automated social and email marketing, enabling businesses to grow.

name: Scoopola
description: Provider of an online ticketing and marketing platform created to revolutionize ticketing, marketing and analytics for live events. The company's Ticketfly platform offers tickets for theaters, billiards and backrooms and factory concert houses as well as analytics and reporting, entry management, support and web design and development services enabling promoters to sell more tickets and streamline operations.

name: Motion Math
description: Developer of engaging educational games designed to help children find delight in intellectual challenge. The company's games use an innovative learning model that playfully teaches the conceptual foundations of math with interactive visuals and provides access to over 900 levels of adaptive content on the web or via iPad applications, enabling students to master the most challenging K-6 standards.

name: Alltrails
description: Provider of an online platform designed to offer detailed and hand-curated trail maps for outdoor explorers. The online platform offers complete, accurate, global dataset for off-road recreation which are provided in a detailed, hand-curated trail maps and gives reviews, photos and information, enabling users to get the required information for their outings and record and share their experience with their family and friends.

name: TeachStreet
description: Provider of an online community website. The company connects teachers, schools and students together. It enables learners to find classes by subject or teacher, as well as provides a public forum that helps teachers, coaches and experts to share what they know.

name: SynergyList
description: Provider of articles and email newsletters related to local events. The company's members receive a curated email of startup events, job opportunities and educational content.

name: Tout
description: Provider of productivity application intended to empower salespeople. The company's software application offers the ability to track email and websites, utilize templates and analytics to enable salespeople to close more deals and increase productivity.

name: OwnLocal
description: Provider of automated digital advertising platform designed to offer the latest in automated advertising, mobile, and syndication technology. The company's digital advertising platform offers AdForge, which automatically converts newspapers print display advertisement into SEO-friendly online ads and other sophisticated digital marketing campaigns, enabling clients to advertise at a broader scale.

name: Chromatik
description: Provider of digital music learning platform designed to help users to play along with sheet music. The company's Chromatik platform offers its users to practice, perform and learn music while they can also upload and download music from website, enabling users to play music and access reference tracks, annotation tools and recording features.

name: Import2
description: Provider of team communication tool. The company's tool brings all business information from various cloud services together in one place for collaboration on your team documents, tasks and contacts.

name: Vungle
description: Provider of a performance marketing platform intended for in-app video advertisements. The company's performance marketing platform uses creative and LTV optimization technologies, enabling publishers to generate revenue with engaging advertisements.
